name: Pardon My Affair
overview: Anna, a marriage counselor, successfully experiences the bitter reality when her husband, Dimas, cheats on her. Trapped in a marital conflict full of betrayal and pain, Anna plans revenge by exposing Dimas's lies and cheating at work. Accompanied by Reyhan, an incredibly solid conglomerate who sincerely loves Anna, will Anna succeed in creating her happiness?
